blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.

Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
